name: doom
description: Doom Code makes Visual Studio Code feel like Doom Emacs by applying a curated, opinionated set of settings that emphasize a fast, keyboard-first workflow and a clean, distraction-free editor.

bindings.name: Show active file in tree/explorer view
Search in a project with a selection
Search all references in side bar

doom.whichKey.menuStyle.markdownDescription: Selects which menu opens for `doom.whichKeyShow`: Doom Code's custom panel UI (`doom`) or the default menu provided by the VSpaceCode WhichKey extension (`vspacecode`).

doom.startPage.openOnActivation.markdownDescription: Open Doom Code's start page whenever the extension activates. The page contains manual install and cleanup actions, repository links, and the current changelog.

commands.title: Doom Code: Clean Up Stale Settings
Doom Code: Toggle Last Editor Group
Doom Code: Fuzzy Search in Current File
Doom Code: Fuzzy Search in Project

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
